overall.description: First-person exploration footage from a cyberpunk video game (resembling Cyberpunk 2077), walking along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway during golden hour. The scene features futuristic architecture with neon-accented billboards, a green glass tower, and construction barriers lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing red and white construction barriers and a corrugated metal market stall on the left

entered.detail: rusty corrugated metal roof structure with various items underneath, resembling a food stand
red and white striped plastic barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
massive concrete elevated highway structure with thick support columns
tall green-tinted glass building with white '02' signage near the top
large orange rectangular billboard structure with purple neon accents and metal scaffolding
multi-level concrete parking garage with distinctive angular geometric facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway in a futuristic city. Red and white construction barriers line the left side next to a corrugated metal market stall, while a distinctive green glass tower rises in the distance. The warm golden hour sunlight casts long shadows across the concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza entrance under highway overpass

events.description: construction barriers end, revealing open concrete area continuing under the overpass
camera turns left toward an open plaza area with palm trees and the green glass building

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass then turning left to face a sunken plaza area with palm trees

entered.detail: tropical palm trees visible in the plaza area to the left
lower level open plaza with railings visible beneath the sidewalk level

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the overpass, the construction barriers end and the path opens up. The camera continues forward then turns left toward a sunken plaza area where palm trees become visible. The green glass tower shifts from the left to center of frame as the perspective changes, while the geometric parking structure recedes into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined industrial walkway beneath an overpass into an open, sun-drenched urban plaza. It begins by moving along a concrete sidewalk lined with red and white construction barriers and a corrugated metal market stall, with a distant green glass tower punctuating the skyline. As the camera progresses deeper under the elevated highway, the barriers end and the path opens up, allowing the warm golden hour light to flood the scene. The perspective then shifts as the camera turns left toward a sunken plaza area where palm trees emerge into view. Finally, the green glass tower moves to the center of the frame while the geometric parking structure recedes into the distance.
